user_story: As a System admin, I want to add a pre joining network approver, so that IT/network pre-joining tasks are routed for approval
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Pre Joining Network Approvers screen; When I click Add new offer approver and select the approver; Then the network approver is created and listed

user_story: As a System admin, I want to edit a pre joining network approver, so that I can update who approves network pre-joining tasks
acceptance_criteria: Given an approver is listed; When I click Edit and change the approver; Then the update is saved

user_story: As a System admin, I want to view the configured pre joining network approvers, so that I know who is responsible for approvals
acceptance_criteria: Given approvers exist; When I open the list; Then the approvers column shows each configured approver
